CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, TIME_CHANGED DATETIME);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, TIME_CHANGED) VALUES (1, now());
UPDATE test_table SET TIME_CHANGED = now() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, TIME_CHANGED FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE log_table (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, log_time DATETIME);
INSERT INTO log_table (log_id, log_time) VALUES (1, now());
SELECT l.log_id, l.log_time FROM log_table l JOIN test_table t ON l.log_id = t.id WHERE t.TIME_CHANGED > now() - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
SELECT datestring(now()), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) AS total_records, (SELECT MAX(TIME_CHANGED) FROM test_table) AS latest_change;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, TIME_CHANGED) SELECT (SELECT MAX(id) + 1 FROM test_table), now() FROM dual;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE TIME_CHANGED BETWEEN now() - INTERVAL '1 HOUR' AND now();
